'''鈭歴-p-y-ng''' ('''kasapyengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:uglify|uglify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-p-y-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uglify|uglify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-p-y-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kasapyengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisapyengoko|thisapyengoko]] || [[word:jisapyengoko|jisapyengoko]] || [[word:shisapyengoko|shisapyengoko]] || [[word:kisapyengoko|kisapyengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusapyengoko|thuthusapyengoko]] || [[word:jujusapyengoko|jujusapyengoko]] || [[word:shushusapyengoko|shushusapyengoko]] || [[word:kukusapyengoko|kukusapyengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosapyengoko|thosapyengoko]] || [[word:josapyengoko|josapyengoko]] || [[word:shosapyengoko|shosapyengoko]] || [[word:kosapyengoko|kosapyengoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosapyengoko|thosapyengoko]] || [[word:josapyengoko|josapyengoko]] || [[word:shosapyengoko|shosapyengoko]] || [[word:kosapyengoko|kosapyengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙sapyengoko|th忙sapyengoko]] || [[word:j忙sapyengoko|j忙sapyengoko]] || [[word:sh忙sapyengoko|sh忙sapyengoko]] || [[word:k忙sapyengoko|k忙sapyengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasapyengoko|thathasapyengoko]] || [[word:jajasapyengoko|jajasapyengoko]] || [[word:shashasapyengoko|shashasapyengoko]] || [[word:kakasapyengoko|kakasapyengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasapyengoko|thasapyengoko]] || [[word:jasapyengoko|jasapyengoko]] || [[word:shasapyengoko|shasapyengoko]] || [[word:kasapyengoko|kasapyengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasapyengoko|thasapyengoko]] || [[word:jasapyengoko|jasapyengoko]] || [[word:shasapyengoko|shasapyengoko]] || [[word:kasapyengoko|kasapyengoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
